resources.title: Provider Packet / Equinix Metal provider GitHub README
resources.evidence_quote: So do you wanna go to the provider packet kind of GitHub page, and we can look at the read me, which will show you how to do your explicit credentials for Equinix metal?

resources.title: Equinix Fabric API documentation
resources.evidence_quote: I'm not gonna point to the API documentation, but you can feel free to go and find that. And I'll put a link in the show notes.

resources.title: Terraform Provider for Equinix examples
resources.evidence_quote: the Terraform provider for Equinix has some examples of how you can of how you can use, say, the Google and the Amazon and Azure, like, link them all up through their through Equinix Fiber to create one, like, humongous cloud network.

resources.title: TBS episode on provider SSH
resources.evidence_quote: And if folks there's also a TBS episode on provider SSH.

resources.title: TVS playlist on the Crossplane YouTube channel
resources.evidence_quote: If you go and look at the the TVS playlist on the Crossplane YouTube channel, there's a few different examples of bootstrapping new providers,
